summary: Colorful gradient wipe reveal text effect component for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/title-gradient-wipe/src/TitleGradientWipe.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `TitleGradientWipe` and `titleGradientWipeDefaultProps`, then register the `TitleGradientWipe` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Title Gradient Wipe Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/title-gradient-wipe to my project. Preserve the exported TitleGradientWipeProps API and register the TitleGradientWipe composition with the default props.
